role: Separate CMS product being built with ClaudeCLI; not the WordPress backend for cms.30nice.vn.

must_not_confuse_with.reason: WordPress source installed on VPS, central CMS/API backend connected to Vercel front-end interfaces.

pre_work_checks: Confirm the user explicitly means 30nice-growth-os, Growth OS, or the ClaudeCLI-built CMS.
Run git status from /root/.openclaw/workspace/projects/30nice-growth-os before edits.
Do not patch, deploy, or overwrite cms.30nice.vn WordPress files from this repo.
domain_calling_rule: When sếp Thuần names admin.30nice.vn, treat it as project 30nice-growth-os.
